info.title: ashwingopalsamy.in — Site API
info.description: Machine-readable knowledge graph and LLM-optimized content index for ashwingopalsamy.in

get.description: Returns a structured knowledge graph describing Ashwin Gopalsamy's expertise, identity, projects, and published content

200.description: Structured JSON knowledge graph with expertise, identity, projects, and content metadata

schema.description: Knowledge graph object with sections for identity, expertise, projects, and writing

get.description: Returns a markdown-formatted index of all content, links, and context — optimized for LLM consumption

200.description: Markdown-formatted index of all site content optimized for LLM ingestion

schema.description: Markdown text with headings, links, and structured content summaries

get.summary: Get full site content for LLMs
get.description: Returns complete site content including all articles, notes, and project descriptions for LLM consumption

200.description: Complete site content including all articles, notes, and project descriptions in plain text

schema.description: Full plain text of all published content on the site
